overview: V-7 Shop is a full-featured mobile-first e-commerce store with a large product catalog, advanced admin dashboard, multiple payment options including Stripe and QR-based UPI/Paytm, product reviews and ratings, and order management.
features: Full product catalog with 4000+ items across 8+ brands
Admin dashboard with inventory, orders, reviews, damaged items, out-of-stock tracking
User reviews and star ratings on every product
QR code scanner for UPI/Paytm payments
Cash on Delivery and multiple payment methods
Order management with cancel, damage reporting
Internet Identity login with admin panel
